I’m still bullish on NFTs.

I swept 130 Cash Cats last night including buying the rarest cat in the collection.

Feel like they match the ethos of Robinhood Chain.

Start from a free mint around an idea - and with enough degens have the potential to become something way bigger.

Robinhood Chain eco is still so young but has an insane amount of growth in front of it.

See no reasons why early collections like this can’t become a blue chip down the road.
